ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trip in milliseconds */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date and time of the trip */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date and time of the trip */,
  "start_station_number" INTEGER /* Number of the starting station */,
  "end_station_number" INTEGER /* Number of the ending station */,
  "bike_number" TEXT /* Number of the bike used */,
  "member_type" TEXT /* Type of the member (e.g., casual, member) */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the member */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the route taken */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the trip */,
  "ride_quality" INTEGER /* Ride quality rating (1-5) */,
  "maintenance_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if maintenance is needed for the bike */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_end_station_number FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_number") REFERENCES stations ("station_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_bike_number FOREIGN KEY ("bike_number") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_start_station_number FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_number") REFERENCES stations ("station_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_number" INTEGER /* Unique number of the station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of bikes the station can hold */,
  "current_bikes" INTEGER /* Number of bikes currently available at the station */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Current maintenance status of the station */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station for geolocation */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station for geolocation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_number" TEXT /* Unique number of the bike */,
  "bike_type" TEXT /* Type of the bike */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the bike was purchased */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Current maintenance status of the bike */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Current battery level for electric bikes */,
  "location" TEXT /* Current location of the bike */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "member_type" TEXT /* Type of the member (e.g., casual, member) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the member */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the member */,
  "membership_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the membership */,
  "membership_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the membership */,
  "membership_status" TEXT /* Current status of the membership */,
  "total_trips" INTEGER /* Total number of trips taken by the member */,
  "total_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of all trips in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id")
)
column_names: Duration of the trip in milliseconds
Start date and time of the trip
End date and time of the trip
Type of the member (e.g., casual, member)
Unique identifier for the route taken
Flag indicating if maintenance is needed for the bike
Maximum number of bikes the station can hold
Number of bikes currently available at the station
Current maintenance status of the station
Latitude of the station for geolocation
Longitude of the station for geolocation
